description:
# Organisms Extraction

Populate libs/ui/src/organisms/ by migrating hitl-form/* and protolabs-report/* from apps/ui/src/components/shared/. Update all import paths.

## Phases
1. Migrate hitl-form to organisms
2. Migrate protolabs-report to organisms
title: [Epic] Organisms Extraction
